Name: Blue Team Labs Online
Description: Defensive security labs focused on investigations, forensics, malware analysis, and practical blue-team workflows.

Name: Crackmes.one
Description: Community archive of reverse engineering challenges for practicing binary analysis and software cracking.

Name: CryptoHack
Description: Cryptography challenge platform that teaches practical crypto attacks through puzzle-style exercises.

Name: CTFlearn
Description: Beginner-friendly CTF platform with challenges across common security categories.

Name: CyberDefenders
Description: Blue-team training platform with investigation, digital forensics, malware analysis, and threat hunting labs.

Name: Exploit Education
Description: Security training projects for memory corruption, exploitation, debugging, and low-level systems practice.

Name: GOAD
Description: Game Of Active Directory is a vulnerable Active Directory lab for practicing common enterprise pentest techniques.

Name: Hack The Box
Description: Cybersecurity training platform with realistic labs, machines, challenges, battlegrounds, and team features.

Name: Hacker101 CTF
Description: Web security CTF from HackerOne with progressive challenges for learning bug bounty skills.

Name: HackThisSite
Description: Classic security challenge site with realistic missions, application flaws, crypto, forensics, and programming tasks.

Name: Microcorruption
Description: Embedded security wargame for reverse engineering firmware and exploiting microcontroller binaries.

Name: OverTheWire
Description: Long-running wargame collection covering Linux basics, web exploitation, cryptography, and advanced security topics.

Name: PentesterLab
Description: Hands-on web application security exercises with labs for common vulnerabilities and exploitation techniques.

Name: picoCTF
Description: Educational CTF platform with accessible security challenges for students, beginners, and classrooms.

Name: PortSwigger Web Security Academy
Description: Interactive web security academy with labs for Burp Suite workflows and modern application vulnerabilities.

Name: pwnable.kr
Description: Wargame focused on binary exploitation, Linux internals, memory corruption, and low-level security puzzles.

Name: pwn.college
Description: Structured cybersecurity education platform with modules for Linux, assembly, exploitation, web, crypto, and more.

Name: RingZer0 Team Online CTF
Description: Online CTF with challenges spanning web, crypto, reverse engineering, forensics, shellcoding, and sysadmin topics.

Name: Root-Me
Description: Large security learning platform with challenges, virtual environments, and community-ranked practice tracks.

Name: TryHackMe
Description: Guided cybersecurity learning platform with rooms, paths, labs, CTF-style exercises, and team training.

Name: VulnHub
Description: Archive of vulnerable virtual machines and boot-to-root practice boxes for offline lab environments.

Name: Webhacking.kr
Description: Web exploitation challenge platform with puzzle-like tasks for browser, server, and application security practice.

Name: WeChall
Description: Challenge aggregation and ranking hub that connects many hacking and puzzle platforms.

Name: Exploit Exercises
Description: Legacy exploitation challenge collection superseded by Exploit Education and kept here for historical reference.

Name: SmashTheStack IO
Description: Legacy wargame environment once used for exploitation practice, preserved in many CTF learning references.
